## Security Issue

⚠️ **For sensitive security issues, please email security@project-chimera.org instead of using this form.**

For non-sensitive security improvements or discussions:

## Security Concern

Please describe the security concern you've identified.

## Severity

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Impact

What is the potential impact of this security issue?

## Proposed Solution

If you have a suggestion for how to address this, please describe it here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, proofs of concept, or references about the security issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked SECURITY.md for reporting guidelines
- [ ] This is NOT a critical security issue (if yes, email security@project-chimera.org)
- [ ] I have provided enough detail to understand the issue
